karen packs peanut butter sandwiches in her daughter's lunch two randomly chosen days of the week the other three school days she packs a ham sandwich she packs a piece of cake on one randomly chosen day and cookies the other four days what is the probability expressed as a percentage that karen packs a ham sandwich and cake on the same day include many in your response

the probability that karen packs a ham sandwich and cake on the same day is many calculated by considering the total number of days and the probability of each event occurring on the same day the total number of days is seven the probability of a ham sandwich is two out of seven and the probability of cake is one out of seven the probability of both events occurring on the same day is many divided by the total number of days which is seven the result is many percent
